note: hand-derived from images/real-plain.jpg (2048x1152, 3840x2160 physical desktop downscaled 0.5333) by 1:1 crop inspection + crosshair verification (crops/verify-*.png). Tolerances: centers accurate to ~±3px; w/h are the clickable element extents used for hit scoring.

targets.ask: the Windows Start button in the taskbar
the clock in the system tray (bottom-right corner)
the Review button in the 'Edited 5 files' card
the 'New task' item at the top of the left sidebar
the 'Open in' button in the top-right toolbar
